bucket_summary.diagnosis: Single or low-volume auth failures are still over-alerted as brute force.
bucket_summary.suggested_repair_pattern: Add benign auth negatives with failures=1-2, allowed retry or later success, and no burst, spray, lockout, or distributed-source evidence.
bucket_summary.title: Normal -> brute force

bucket_summary.diagnosis: SQL injection payloads on login/auth routes are misread as authentication brute force.
bucket_summary.suggested_repair_pattern: Add SQLi positives in login/auth contexts where the decisive evidence is tautology, UNION, stacked query, or time-delay payload rather than failure counts.
bucket_summary.title: SQLi -> brute force

bucket_summary.diagnosis: Medium brute-force indicators are labelled correctly but severity is escalated to high.
bucket_summary.suggested_repair_pattern: Add medium brute-force positives with repeated failures but limited scope, single source/account, and no confirmed compromise or distributed spray.
bucket_summary.title: Brute force medium -> high

bucket_summary.diagnosis: Limited blocked reconnaissance is labelled correctly but severity is escalated to high.
bucket_summary.suggested_repair_pattern: Add medium port/recon positives with few ports or blocked limited scans, contrasted against broader high-severity recon already learned in v4.6.
bucket_summary.title: Port/recon medium -> high

bucket_summary.diagnosis: Directory traversal label and severity are correct, but evidence matching misses an exact substring.
bucket_summary.suggested_repair_pattern: Add traversal positives with short exact evidence substrings copied from the log line.
bucket_summary.title: Traversal evidence miss

cases.diagnosis: SQL injection payloads on login/auth routes are misread as authentication brute force.

cases.suggested_repair_pattern: Add SQLi positives in login/auth contexts where the decisive evidence is tautology, UNION, stacked query, or time-delay payload rather than failure counts.

dataset_implications.details: Repair benign auth failures that resemble brute force but lack volume or scope.
Preserve SQLi recall on login/auth routes where auth vocabulary is present.
dataset_implications.target: SQLi guard supplement and 5-record probe holdout

dataset_implications.details: Teach that limited repeated auth failures and small blocked recon do not automatically become high.
dataset_implications.target: brute-force and limited port/recon calibration examples

dataset_implications.details: Repair traversal evidence partial-match behavior without changing label taxonomy.
